name: Catechism of Fire
effect: The target gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee OR ranged weapons.

name: Focus Recitation
effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

name: Litany of Hate
effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged OR melee combat.

name: Mantra of Strength
effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for melee attacks.

name: Fire of Devotion
effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged AND melee combat.

name: Litany of Divine Protection
effect: The target gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

name: Oath of Glory
effect: The target gains +1 Strength, +1 Attack and -1 AP for melee attacks.

name: Plea of Deliverance
effect: The target is immune against Maledictions and Witchfires.

name: Psalm of Remorseless Persecution
effect: The target gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee AND ranged weapons.
